about.title: About me
about.subtitle: A bit about my experience and approach to development
paragraphs: I'm a fullstack developer with experience building complex web applications — from startup MVPs to high-load enterprise systems.
I specialize in the TypeScript ecosystem: React and Next.js on the frontend, Node.js and NestJS on the backend. I value clean architecture, type safety, and automation.
I believe that good code is code that's easy to read, test, and scale. Every project is not just a set of features, but a well-thought-out solution to a business problem.
